SCRAPYARD_RELIC_SCRAPYARD_RELIC.title: Defective Core
SCRAPYARD_RELIC_SCRAPYARD_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, apply [blue]-3[/blue] [gold]Electric Potential[/gold] to a random enemy.
SCRAPYARD_RELIC_SCRAPYARD_RELIC.flavor: A core still leaking negative potential.
SCRAPYARD_RELIC_SCRAPYARD_PERFECT_CORE_R: At the start of combat, apply [blue]-3[/blue] [gold]Electric Potential[/gold] to a random enemy [blue]5[/blue] times.
Its defect was preserved perfectly, and is therefore more stable.
